mapper.select: SELECT nu.id as id, nu.parent_id as parentId, n.scientific_name as scientificName, n.authorship as authorship, n.rank as rank, nu.status as status, n.code as nomenclaturalCode, vs.source_id as sourceId, vs.source_dataset_key as sourceDatasetKey, pvs.source_id as parentSourceId, pvs.source_dataset_key as parentSourceDatasetKey FROM name_usage nu INNER JOIN name n on n.id = nu.name_id AND n.dataset_key=#{datasetKey} LEFT JOIN verbatim_source vs on vs.id = nu.id AND vs.dataset_key=#{datasetKey} LEFT JOIN verbatim_source pvs on pvs.id = nu.parent_id AND pvs.dataset_key=#{datasetKey} WHERE nu.dataset_key = #{datasetKey}
